allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('version:', p.version, '\\nmain:', p.main, '\\nexports:', JSON.stringify\(p.exports,null,2\).slice\(0,400\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./node_modules/colyseus/package.json'\); console.log\('version:', p.version\); console.log\('exports keys:', Object.keys\(p.exports||{}\).join\(', '\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const {Room, Server} = require\('./node_modules/colyseus/build/index.js'\); console.log\('Room:', typeof Room, 'Server:', typeof Server\)")

Bash(node -e "const s = require\('./node_modules/@colyseus/schema/build/index.js'\); console.log\('Schema:', typeof s.Schema, 'MapSchema:', typeof s.MapSchema, 'type:', typeof s.type, 'defineTypes:', typeof s.defineTypes\)")
Bash(node -e "const s = require\('@colyseus/schema'\); console.log\('Schema:', typeof s.Schema, 'MapSchema:', typeof s.MapSchema, 'type:', typeof s.type, 'defineTypes:', typeof s.defineTypes\)")
